title: Project Report: Research Agent with Web Search — Agentic AI Engineer
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: LangChain agent that searches the web, summarizes findings, and cites sources.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Beginner)*

**Research Agent with Web Search** is a beginner-level end-to-end project for Agentic AI Engineer. Duration: 2 weeks. LangChain agent that searches the web, summarizes findings, and cites sources. Tools: LangChain, Python, Search API.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Define 3 tools (search, summarize, save)
Objective: Agent loop with max 5 steps
Objective: Output markdown report with citations
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Agentic AI Engineer portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Agentic AI Engineer resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Agentic AI Engineer resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: Tools
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Tools** *(Level: Beginner)*

Implement tool functions. Complete these tasks: Web search API; File writer. Deliverable for this phase: Tool schemas.

Code Reference:

```text
- [ ] File writer
```

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Beginner)*

Submit all final deliverables: Agent code; Sample reports; Test results. Skills demonstrated: Agents, Tool use, LangChain. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Agent code
Deliverable: Sample reports
Deliverable: Test results
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Agent code and passes the rubric.
